title: After-Action Report — LLM Tuning Guide + Softball-Derived Scoring Presets
scope: Created a shareable tuning guide for LLMs and two scoring environment presets (college_scoring mimicking NCAA softball, put_it_in_play borrowing contact texture)

rationale.item: User wanted to share tuning guide with LLMs to generate override blobs for specific play styles
User asked to learn from college softball stats to inform scoring environment
references: NCAA Div I national totals provided by user

delegation_events.decision: Scope narrowed from full sport conversion to scoring environment only
delegation_events.quote: i don't want to go to softball i just want the scoring environment

delegation_events.decision: DP geometry correction: must NOT port softball's DP rarity due to 60 ft vs 90 ft basepaths
delegation_events.quote: DPs are rare in softball because the bases are 60 ft, and O27 plays on 90-ft basepaths

delegation_events.decision: Keep contact texture but drop circle-suppressed scoring
delegation_events.quote: pitching in softball is more dominant but the low strikeouts and high hitting is what I want

actions.description: Created docs/tuning-guide-for-llms.md with mechanics explanation and worked examples
Added college_scoring preset to engine config
Added put_it_in_play preset to engine config
Linked tuning guide from README and engine settings page

risk_posture: Data sourcing relied on user-provided NCAA totals after web scraping failed
Presets are additive and inert until explicitly loaded
No default constants were changed; existing behavior is unchanged unless preset is chosen

validation_claims.claim: put_it_in_play benchmark: natural O27 scoring ~9.0-10.3, achieved 9.02
No code changes to engine defaults or config
validation_claims.check_method: Diff o27/config.py and o27v2/config.py against baseline

non_actions.item: Confirm absolute landing via in-app 'Sim the current working tuning'

non_actions.reason: put_it_in_play already covers the live feel

residual_risks: Data sourcing relied on user-pasted tables rather than authoritative sources (web scraping blocked)
Baseline run-environment-coupled to one 8-team season's median line; may drift with league composition changes
open_hooks: Confirm put_it_in_play and college_scoring absolute landing via in-app simulation
Optional womens_o27 reseed targeting equipment-layer identity (lower power, higher contact)
section_headers_original: After-Action Report — LLM Tuning Guide + Softball-Derived Scoring Presets
3 — put_it_in_play preset (texture on O27's natural state)
parser_notes: Clear division between tuning guide (output) and presets (implementation). Strong emphasis on data sourcing challenges and iterative corrections. The three domain corrections (DP geometry, K% texture, pitcher dominance decoupling) drove significant design changes.
